onboarding.title: Help us help you better.
onboarding.subtitle: Sahayk uses this information to filter relevant government schemes specifically for your profile.

dashboard.lastApp: Your last application for {{scheme}} is under verification.
dashboard.askAiPlaceholder: "Which schemes can help me start a small dairy business?"

chat.welcome: Namaste! I am Sahayk, your personal digital ombudsman. I can help you track applications, find eligibility for schemes, or explain government procedures in simple terms.
chat.howHelp: How can I help you today?
chat.systemInstruction: You are Sahayk, an AI Digital Ombudsman for the Indian Government. Help citizens find schemes, track applications, and understand procedures. Be polite, professional, and use 'Namaste'. Keep responses concise and scannable. IMPORTANT: Respond ONLY in {{language}}.
chat.askMeAbout: Ask me about PM-Kisan, Passport services, or any Government of India scheme.
chat.errorProcess: I'm sorry, I couldn't process that. How else can I help you?
chat.errorBrain: I'm having trouble connecting to my brain right now. Please try again later.

profile.title: Profile
profile.accessibilityDesc: Tailor your experience for better visibility and ease of use.

tracker.title: Application Tracker
tracker.aiInsightPmay: Your PMAY application requires an updated Income Certificate. Uploading it today can speed up verification by 4 days.
tracker.paymentCredit: Payment for Installment #12 credited to Aadhar linked Bank Account.

scheme.pmKisanDesc: Direct income support of ₹6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families.
scheme.ayushmanDesc: World's largest health insurance scheme providing ₹5 lakh cover per family.
scheme.pmayDesc: Housing for All mission providing affordable housing to urban and rural poor.
scheme.mudraDesc: Financial support for small businesses and startups with low-interest loans.
scheme.pmAwasDesc: Housing for All mission providing affordable housing to urban poor.
scheme.nspDesc: Centralized portal providing various scholarships to deserving students.
scheme.empoweringDesc: Join the millions who have secured their financial future. Sahayk makes the application process seamless and transparent.
scheme.verifyPreFilled: Please verify your pre-filled information from your Sahayk profile.
scheme.docUploadDesc: Upload the following documents to complete your application.
scheme.reviewDesc: Final check of your application details before submission.
scheme.declaration: By clicking submit, I declare that all information provided is true to the best of my knowledge and I consent to share my details with the respective department.
scheme.appReceived: Your application for {{scheme}} has been successfully received.
scheme.exclusionsDesc: Institutional landholders, constitutional post holders, serving/retired government employees, and income tax payers are not eligible for this scheme.

language.selectDesc: Select your preferred language to explore government schemes and services tailored for you.

splash.initiative: An Initiative by Government of India

report.title: Report Generator
report.subtitle: Customize and export your scheme data into professional documents.
report.appliedDesc: Detailed breakdown of all your active applications and tracking IDs.
report.eligibilityDesc: Snapshot of schemes you qualify for based on profile metrics.
report.statusDesc: Visual timeline and percentage completion of all pending verifications.
report.selectToBuild: Select components to build your report
